issue_summary: Detect changes on File's size and type as well as last modified and "refresh" the values that were compared
javadoc_before:
/** * Refresh the attributes from the underlying {@link File}. *

* This implementation refreshes the name, exists * directory and lastModified properties. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Refresh the attributes from the {@link File}, indicating * whether the file has changed. *

* This implementation refreshes the name, exists, * directory, lastModified and length * properties. *

* The exists, directory, lastModified * and length properties are compared for changes * * @param file the file instance to compare to * @return true if the file has changed, otherwise false */
